# Agibot GDK Docs Mirror

Captured from:
https://support.agibot.com/?gdk_version=2.6.3#contents/reference/Python/robot.md

The support page is a Vue app. Its markdown content is loaded from:
https://genie-data-support-1347244451.oss-cn-shanghai.aliyuncs.com/gdk_api_docs

Local entry points:

- `gdk_api_docs/globalConfig.json` - available GDK doc versions.
- `gdk_api_docs/2.6.3/config.json` - table of contents for the mirrored docs.
- `gdk_api_docs/2.6.3/manifest.json` - capture metadata, source URLs, file sizes, and checksums.
- `gdk_api_docs/2.6.3/docs/index.md` - GDK overview.
- `gdk_api_docs/2.6.3/docs/contents/reference/Python/robot.md` - Python robot-control API.
- `gdk_api_docs/2.6.3/docs/contents/reference/ROS2/control_node.md` - ROS2 control node reference.

This mirror contains 43 markdown documents for GDK `2.6.3`.
